articles.title: 3 things the Bruins must fix if they want to punch their ticket to the playoffs
articles.description:
A dormant power play and major regression from both Morgan Geekie and Elias Lindholm has hindered Boston's playoff push.

The post 3 things the Bruins must fix if they want to punch their ticket to the playoffs appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Address power play issues to improve scoring chances for the Bruins.
Morgan Geekie and Elias Lindholm's performance has regressed significantly this season.
Fixing these issues is crucial for Boston's playoff qualification this year.

articles.title: 5 Red Sox takeaways as Wilyer Abreu and Eduardo Rodriguez lift Venezuela to World Baseball Classic title
articles.description:
Abreu hit a huge home run in the championship game.

The post 5 Red Sox takeaways as Wilyer Abreu and Eduardo Rodriguez lift Venezuela to World Baseball Classic title appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Wilyer Abreu hit a crucial home run in the World Baseball Classic final.
Eduardo Rodriguez contributed significantly to Venezuela's victory on March 17, 2026.
Boston Red Sox fans celebrate local players' success on an international stage.

articles.title: Venezuela beats US 3-2 on Suárez’s 9th-inning double to win first World Baseball Classic title
articles.description:
Despite a heralded roster of stars led by Aaron Judge, Bryc Harper, and Paul Skenes, the US lost its second straight final of baseball's premier international event and remained without a title since 2017.

The post Venezuela beats US 3-2 on Suárez’s 9th-inning double to win first World Baseball Classic title appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Venezuela won its first World Baseball Classic title, defeating the US 3-2.
US stars Aaron Judge and Bryce Harper failed to secure a win in the final.
Boston baseball fans may feel disappointment as US remains titleless since 2017.

articles.title: Bruins fall to Canadiens 3-2 in overtime
articles.description:
Pavel Zacha had both goals for Boston, and Jeremy Swayman stopped 28 shots.

The post Bruins fall to Canadiens 3-2 in overtime appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins lost to Canadiens 3-2 in overtime on March 17.
Pavel Zacha scored both goals for Boston in the match.
Jeremy Swayman made 28 saves, highlighting his performance despite the loss.
